message:
style(tls): reformat TLS handshake timeout match expression for readability

Collapse the multi-line `crate::time::timeout(...)` call arguments onto
fewer lines and re-indent the trailing `.await` to align with the match
arm, improving visual clarity of the handshake timeout control flow in
TlsAcceptor::accept without changing any logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
